_comment: Wave 18z — audit-worker service config. Point Railway's audit-worker service at this file via Service Settings → 'Config-as-code file path' = railway.worker.json. Path-filtered redeploys mean web-only commits (e.g. src/app/**, src/components/**) no longer kill in-flight cycles; only commits touching the listed paths trigger an audit-worker rebuild. Drain grace (drainingSeconds: 960 = 16 min) is matched to WORKER_SHUTDOWN_GRACE_MS in apps/audit-runner/worker-loop.ts so SIGTERM has time to drain the in-flight cycle before SIGKILL. Do NOT use this for the web service — see docs/ROADMAP.md Wave 18z for full setup notes.
